expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: historical analogs become required-before-ship gates
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly covers the case focus and the required gating concept: result.md states the case focus as “historical analogs become required-before-ship gates” and cites the Phase 5b rubric requirement: “Historical analogs that remain relevant must be rendered as explicit `[ANALOG-GATE]` entries in the release recommendation... Release recommendation must enumerate all `[ANALOG-GATE]` items that remain blocking before ship.” It also evaluates that these gates cannot be verified due to missing artifacts, but the focus is explicitly addressed.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The output is Phase 5b-centered and checks Phase 5b contract artifacts and rubric: result.md identifies “Primary phase under test: Phase 5b,” lists required Phase 5b outputs (checkpoint_audit, checkpoint_delta, qa_plan_phase5b), and evaluates their absence under “Phase alignment.” The verdict is framed as a Phase 5b checkpoint enforcement failure based on missing Phase 5b artifacts.
